rationale: Educ. Code §28.016 governs curriculum requirements for grades 7-8 career and college preparation. It contains no provisions referencing homestead exemption amounts, property tax appraised values, or Tax Code §11.13. No direct or indirect conflict exists.
quote: Each school district shall provide instruction to students in grade seven or eight in preparing for high school, college, and a career.
_note: No conflict. §28.016 is purely curriculum-related; the proposed homestead exemption increase affects property tax revenue but does not conflict with this statute's operative requirements.
